case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. SHIRLEY J SORIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
